# terrible_community_hrobot_storagebox (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `id` (Number) The ID of the storage box to modify.

### Optional

- `external_reachability` (Boolean) Whether the storage box is externally reachable.
- `hetzner_token` (String)
- `name` (String) The name of the storage box.
- `samba` (Boolean) Whether the storage box is accessible through SAMBA.
- `ssh` (Boolean) Whether the storage box is accessible through SSH.
- `webdav` (Boolean) Whether the storage box is accessible through WebDAV.
- `zfs` (Boolean) Whether the ZFS directory is visible.
